comments.body:
## TDD: Tests from 686c-8cdd must fail RED before, pass GREEN after

Create plugins/dso/scripts/gh-identity-resolver.sh

## Implementation
- Modes: --own-identity or --bot
- --own-identity: gh api user, extract login/name, email fallback chain
- BRIDGE_ENV_ID: gh api repos/:owner/:repo or git remote -v fallback
- Output: BRIDGE_BOT_LOGIN, BRIDGE_BOT_NAME, BRIDGE_BOT_EMAIL (or PROMPT_NEEDED), BRIDGE_ENV_ID
- Error handling: gh not installed, not authenticated, API errors
- Remove RED marker from .test-index

## Files
- CREATE: plugins/dso/scripts/gh-identity-resolver.sh
- EDIT: .test-index

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Script exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/gh-identity-resolver.sh
- [ ] Script handles missing arguments gracefully
  Verify: { $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/gh-identity-resolver.sh 2>/dev/null; test $? -ne 0; }
- [ ] RED marker removed from .test-index
  Verify: { grep 'gh-identity-resolver.sh' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | grep -qv '\['; }
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: GAP-4 AC amendment: key=value output goes to stdout only, all diagnostic/error messages to stderr. Exit code contract: 0=success (all fields resolved or PROMPT_NEEDED), 1=fatal error (gh missing/unauth).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete - gh-identity-resolver.sh created, chmod +x, RED marker removed from .test-index ✓

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: All acceptance criteria verified ✓ - Script executable, handles missing args, RED marker removed, all 18 tests GREEN
